sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (original String, converted String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original;
INSERT INTO test_strings (original, converted) VALUES ('hello world', convertCharset('hello world', 'UTF8', 'UTF16'));
SELECT original, converted FROM test_strings WHERE converted = convertCharset(original, 'UTF8', 'UTF16');
SELECT convertCharset(original, 'UTF8', 'UTF32') AS new_encoding FROM test_strings;
